fn_lock.title: Fn Lock
fn_lock.description: Access multimedia keys without holding Fn
fn_lock.tooltip: When enabled, the multimedia functions will be accessible without having to hold the Fn key.

super_key.title: Super key
super_key.tooltip: Whether to enable or not the Super (Windows) key.

touchpad.title: Touchpad
touchpad.tooltip: Whether to enable orthe laptop's touchpad.

conservation.title: Battery conservation mode
conservation.description: Limits the charge of the battery to extend its lifespan
conservation.tooltip: When enabled, the battery will not charge above a certain value (usually around 50-70%) in order to extend its lifespan.

fast_charge.title: Battery fast charge mode
fast_charge.description: Allows the battery to charge faster
fast_charge.tooltip: When enabled, allows the battery to charge faster at the cost of its lifespan.

always_on_usb.title: Always ON USB
always_on_usb.description: Keeps the USB ports always powered on
always_on_usb.tooltip: Keeps the USB ports powered on even if the laptop is suspended.

overdrive.title: Display Overdrive
overdrive.tooltip:
Reduces the display latency in order to limit ghosting and trailing images.
Increases power consumption and may introduce othher graphical defects.

hybrid.title: Hybrid graphics mode
hybrid.tooltip:
Enables the processor's integrated graphics.
Decreases power consupmtion by allowing the dedicated GPU to power down and work only when necessary but slightly decreases performance.
Reboot is required to apply the change.
